title: Aurora World 16486 Mini Flopsies Chestnut Horse Toy ,Brown,8-Inch
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Mini Flopsies Chestnut Horse Toy Chestnut the horse is part of our Mini Flopsies collection. He is the perfect gift for horse lovers of all ages, his beans give him a flexible body so he can be put in the sitting position. He has a fluffy tail and mane as well as a white diamond on his nose. This 8" Mini Flopsie Chestnut Horse is lovingly crafted with a soft and cuddly brown coat. With a bean filled floppy body, this Mini Flopsie is a great cuddle buddy and an even better friend. Top quality materials are used to ensure durability and softness. Suitable from birth
